graded_findings.rationale: Adding a hardcoded external fleet-wide status collector is a substantive architectural addition outside the documented worker/master, ETCD or Metastore, and existing observability model. This changes deployment, ownership, failure, and HA/security assumptions, so it should stop merge until modeled or removed.

Introducing DS_CLUSTER_TOKEN, .env secret loading, and body-carried collector authentication creates a new credential path not present in the documented security model. That is a real adherence gap for infrastructure code and should block until aligned with existing auth/config contracts or explicitly accepted in the mental model.
